item.description: Maybe I should get a greenscreen for nicer backdrops lol I hope your weekend is not as warm as mine <3 Though the coming week will climb to 39°C :x Anyway, have a lovely day and stay hydrated!

item.title: Just unrelated memes <.<
item.description:
The legal system is designed to protect the powerful from you, not the other way around
Sometimes that looks like bribing the government to keep their ability to extort you
Other times it’s removing your rights to make sure you don’t get any ideas
If only there was someway to fix all that, hmmm
Billionaires (and trillionaires now I guess) all got that way from the exploitation inherent to capitalism btw…
The green part is how they become billionaires. Yes we could tax them out of existence, we could also just stop them from taking what’s rightfully ours in the first place.
If you’re wondering what that looks like:
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: Cooper the dog's family welcomed Winston the kitten in early 2025 and they became inseparable. One day on May 2026 Winston went missing
item.description:
Cooper kept waiting for Winston outside where they played together everyday https://www.instagram.com/reels/DYSjZ7SvVED/
Four days later Winston had returned home and Cooper was so happy https://www.instagram.com/reels/DYUnoiio4c3/

item.dc:creator: BecauseGodisDead

item.title: He's the only father I've ever known
item.description: And he can rot for all I care August 22nd, 1955 - July 17, 2025. He *claims* demons made him do it. I don't believe that for a second. Rather, my mother was starting to realize that Trump is a fascist and that she was mislead. I believe she was stabbed to death for trying to talk my stepfather out of the MAGA cult.
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1724 (Bread and Circuses Sunday)
item.description:
Let's get this Bread (and circuses). Ah shit, "Bread and Circuses" was there the whole fucking time for these Roman history dumps from me. *goes back to change the title*
All Roman history dumps i make include "Byzantine" history because the "Byzantines" considered themselves Romans. [Flame war begins in comments probably]
"Halfdan was here"
Seriously, Mithradates VI Eupator is one of the most fascinating people of classical antiquity as far as I'm concerned.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep. Glory. Glory Pippin." ___
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Fathers Day
item.description: This one is for everybody who didn't have a father in their life. Don't fret today. Become the leader the absent father should have been.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Yay accommodation
item.description: Anyway, I recently was diagnosed with another disability, and it’s affecting my work. So I put in an accommodation request to reduce the amount of physical labor I need to do. After a brief meeting with my store manager yesterday where he said he wasn’t sure how he would manage an accommodation like that, I go home and get this series of texts today.
item.dc:creator: Justanotherthrowaway2718

item.title: You go big, or you go home.
item.description: She understood the assignment. One love.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: GovBrief Today #506
item.description: A three-time Olympian reached into the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool to feel a strip of peeling paint, and Park Police led him away in handcuffs. The paint is peeling and the water has gone swamp green, two weeks after a $14 million renovation. Donald Trump ordered the pool drained and repainted, then rushed the job for the Fourth of July. Engineers say the blue he chose likely fed the algae bloom that took over within days. None of it is sabotage, but he called it sabotage and put the National Guard around the basin. His evidence was a chemical-attack story born on a satirical Facebook page, one that climbed through right-wing accounts until it reached his Truth Social feed late that night. Handed a fiasco with his name on it, Donald Trump's government chose to handcuff a 67-year-old rather than blame the man who picked the paint and set the deadline. I've emailed 7,901 stories over 506 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260620-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/boylehts-fire [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june20 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/china-spacex [4] https://go.govbrief.today/cassidy-specialed [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boston-faa [6] https://go.govbrief.today/olympian-arrested [7] https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-evictions Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

26 Man Tax: Adam Dean Ayadi
"I keep my ideals, because in spite of everything I still believe that people are really good at heart." -Anne Frank So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
